error.api_key_missing: DART_API_KEY environment variable not set. Register at opendart.fss.or.kr to obtain.
error.lookup_query_required: action='lookup' requires query (corp name / stock code / corp_code).
error.lookup_not_found: No matching record: {{query}} (verify corp name / stock code / corp_code).
error.document_rcept_no_required: action='document' requires rcept_no (receipt number from list result).
error.corp_code_required: action='{{action}}' requires corp_code (or query/stock_code for auto resolve).
error.corp_codes_required: Multi-company action requires corp_codes (array of corp names / stock codes / corp_codes).
error.idx_cl_code_required: Financial-index action requires idx_cl_code (M210000 profitability / M220000 stability / M230000 growth / M240000 activity).
error.sj_div_required: xbrlTaxonomy action requires sj_div (financial-statement division: BS1/IS1/CF1 etc).
